>Hey, I heard about your Virtual Onboarding Suite from a colleague and I'm curious about it.
>Onboarding takes too LONG at my company, like it really slows down productivity. 😩
>Hey Jessica! Thanks for reaching out! Yeah, onboarding can be such a pain. Our suite can help cut that time in half, like, really.
>Wow, 50% is impressive! But um, how does it work exactly?
>For sure! So, we’ve got interactive checklists, virtual training modules, and real-time feedback systems. It’s all designed to engage new hires FROM the start.
>Sounds cool, but idk if my team will actually ADOPT this. 😬
>Totally get that concern! We've seen great adoption rates bc it’s pretty user-friendly and integrates with existing systems.
>INTEGRATION with what we have currently is super important. We're using some old HRIS stuff.
>We can definitely work with that! Our platform’s customizable so there’s flexibility to fit your needs.
>Ok, that’s good to know! But also, how do you keep new hires engaged during this process?
>Great question!! It’s all about interactive content, like gamified training and community building features. Keeps things fun and engaging.
>That sounds promising. But like, what if the team doesn’t use it? 😕
>We offer training and support to help everyone get comfortable. Plus, there are analytics to track engagement, so you can see what's working.
>Yeah, I guess that makes sense. What's the pricing like?
>It's subscription-based, $299/month. But think of the time saved and engagement boost!
>Hmm, still need to think about it tbh but this is helpful!
